name: Planner, Reminders, and Alarms
description: Create reminders, set Android alarms, list saved reminders, cancel saved reminders, and plan the user's day from memory and current priorities.

toolDeclarations.name: create_reminder
toolDeclarations.description: Save a reminder and open Android Calendar with a matching reminder event. Use this when the user asks to be reminded about something.

dueAt.description: Local date/time for the reminder in ISO-like format, e.g. 2026-05-05T18:30:00.

autonomous.description: If true, the AI will automatically tap the Save button in the Calendar app. Only use this if the user has explicitly given permission or enabled global autonomy.

toolDeclarations.name: set_alarm
toolDeclarations.description: Create an Android alarm for a specific local time. Use this for wake-up alarms, timers expressed as an alarm time, or alarm requests.

time.description: Local time in HH:mm 24-hour format, or a full ISO-like date/time.

skipUi.description: Whether Android should try to set the alarm without opening the clock UI.

toolDeclarations.name: list_reminders
toolDeclarations.description: List saved reminders from Idan's local reminder store.

toolDeclarations.name: cancel_reminder
toolDeclarations.description: Cancel a saved Idan reminder by id or by matching title text. This removes Idan's saved copy; Android Calendar or Clock entries may still need manual removal.

title.description: Reminder title or title fragment to cancel.

toolDeclarations.name: plan_my_day
toolDeclarations.description: Create a practical day plan from the user's memory, current priorities, calendar-like commitments, energy preference, and available hours.

date.description: Date being planned in YYYY-MM-DD format.

memorySummary.description: Useful facts from agent memory about the user, habits, preferences, tasks, people, and recent events.

priorities.description: The main tasks or outcomes to include today.

commitments.description: Fixed appointments, classes, calls, errands, or deadlines.
